name: Mexican Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onion in oil in a 10-inch skillet until tender.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the chicken breasts and mushrooms. Heat to boiling; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
3. Place chicken, skin sides up, in a single layer in the skillet. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 30 minutes.
4. Add mushrooms, cover and cook until chicken is done, about 15 minutes longer.
